channel.title: Beginners on Rack Myself
channel.description: Recent content in Beginners on Rack Myself

item.title: Docker Compose for Beginners: Run Any App in Minutes
item.description: Learn Docker Compose from scratch. This beginner guide explains containers, docker-compose.yml, and how to run real self-hosted apps on your home server.

item.title: The Beginner Homelab: What to Buy First and Why
item.description: Your first homelab doesn't need to be expensive or complicated. Here's exactly what to buy first, what to skip, and how to start running real services today.
